provisions.content: These Rules may be cited as the Traffic (Remission of Fees) Rules.

The fees prescribed and rules made hereunder for driving licences, certificates of competence, and tests are hereby remitted in the case of persons in the employment of the Government as drivers of motor vehicles owned by the government and in respect only of such vehicles.
